prompt: Write a measure for each product's sales as a % of its category total that still respects slicers (year, country), grounded in the Contoso-lite schema.

assertions.text: Clears product-level filters with REMOVEFILTERS/ALL on 'Product'[Product] (and/or 'Product'[Subcategory]) to build the category denominator
Denominator keeps 'Product'[Category] and other slicers — does NOT wipe them with REMOVEFILTERS('Product') wholesale or ALL() that removes Year/Country
Builds on the existing [Total Sales] measure
References only columns that exist in the schema
Explains that other slicers (Year, Country) remain in the filter context
